name: markhub
description: MarkHub — self-hosted bookmark hub (Web SPA + API)

scripts.deploy: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote && wrangler deploy
scripts.test:parity: cd server && python -m pytest -q tests/test_parity_live.py tests/test_round2_fixes.py -k parity
scripts.lint:python: cd server && ruff check app tests
scripts.dev:cf: pnpm --filter @markhub/web build && pnpm --filter @markhub/worker exec wrangler dev --local
